headline: Cadence Announces Collaboration with Intel Foundry to Accelerate Intel 14A Process Optimization for HPC and Mobile Designs
summary: SAN JOSE, Calif., June 08, 2026--Cadence (Nasdaq: CDNS) today announced an expanded collaboration with Intel Foundry to advance Design Technology Co-Optimization (DTCO) targeting Intel’s next-generation process technologies, beginning with Intel 14A. The new multi-year agreement combines Cadence’s agentic AI-driven EDA and Design IP solutions with Intel’s process innovation and advanced design expertise.

headline: Nvidia And Other 6 Chip Stocks Set For A 'Secular Upside,' Analyst Says
summary: BofA's Vivek Arya says the AI debate has shifted from ROI to scarcity, naming Nvidia, Credo and five more chip stocks with catch-up potential.
